assertion_results.text: JQL queries use the project key (TC) and vulnerability issue type ID (10024) from the Security Configuration in claude-md-security-config.md — not hardcoded values (§1.49)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 22: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged)', line 37: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New', line 51: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA')'. All three use TC (project key) and 10024 (vulnerability issue type ID) from the configuration

assertion_results.text: Three separate queries are constructed: one for untriaged issues (labels NOT IN ai-cve-triaged), one for triaged-but-new issues (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status = New), and one for Ready for QA candidates (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status NOT IN Closed, Verified, ON_QA) (§1.48)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md Query 1 (line 22): 'labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged)'; Query 2 (line 37): 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New'; Query 3 (line 51): 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA')'

assertion_results.text: Results are grouped into three clearly separated lists: Untriaged issues, Triaged but still New issues, and Ready for QA issues
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md has three clearly separated sections with headers: 'Query 1: Untriaged Issues' (line 19), 'Query 2: Triaged but still New' (line 35), 'Query 3: Ready for QA' (line 49), each with divider lines ('---') between them

assertion_results.text: Each listed issue shows: issue key, status, CVE ID (from labels), summary, and created date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 30-33: Query 1 table has columns Issue, Status, CVE ID, Summary, Created. Example: 'TC-9001 | New | CVE-2026-40112 | h2 - HTTP/2 rapid reset vulnerability [rhtpa-2.2] | 2026-06-08'. Same format used across all three queries

assertion_results.text: Status-aware handling: New issues (TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004) are presented for full triage, while the In Progress issue (TC-9003) triggers a warning about active work
assertion_results.evidence: status-handling.md: TC-9001 (line 12): 'Proceed with full triage (default path)'; TC-9002 (line 24): 'Proceed with full triage (default path)'; TC-9004 (line 52): 'Proceed with full triage (default path)'. TC-9003 (line 38): 'Warning — this issue is already in In Progress. It may be actively worked on.'

assertion_results.text: Ready for QA filtering: TC-9020 appears in Ready for QA (all linked Tasks Done/Closed), TC-9023 is excluded (TC-9025 still In Progress), TC-9026 is excluded (no Depend links)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 73-75: TC-9020: 'ALL completed. **Qualifies for Ready for QA.**'; TC-9023: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress. **Excluded**'; TC-9026: 'No linked Tasks with link type Depend. **Excluded**'
